matrix_homeserver.name: Matrix homeserver URL
matrix_homeserver.description: The Matrix homeserver URL used by the gateway.

matrix_user_id.name: Bot user ID (MXID)
matrix_user_id.description: The Matrix user ID for the gateway account.

matrix_password.name: Password
matrix_password.description: The password for the gateway account.

matrix_access_token.name: Access token
matrix_access_token.description: Optional access token for the gateway account.

matrix_gateway_token.name: Gateway API token
matrix_gateway_token.description: The shared token used to authenticate requests to the gateway.

matrix_device_id.name: Device ID
matrix_device_id.description: Optional Matrix device ID for the gateway session.

matrix_device_name.name: Device name
matrix_device_name.description: The Matrix device name shown to the homeserver.

matrix_store_path.name: Store path
matrix_store_path.description: Where the gateway should keep its local encryption store.

matrix_gateway_host.name: Listen host
matrix_gateway_host.description: The host interface the gateway should bind to.

matrix_gateway_port.name: Listen port
matrix_gateway_port.description: The TCP port used by the gateway API.

verify_ssl.name: Verify TLS certificate
verify_ssl.description: Verify the homeserver TLS certificate when connecting.

matrix_ignore_unverified_devices.name: Ignore unverified devices
matrix_ignore_unverified_devices.description: Allow the gateway to ignore unverified Matrix devices.

matrix_inbound_webhook_url.name: Inbound webhook URL
matrix_inbound_webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL for inbound Matrix events.

matrix_inbound_shared_secret.name: Inbound shared secret
matrix_inbound_shared_secret.description: Optional shared secret for inbound webhook validation.

matrix_debug_endpoints.name: Enable debug endpoints
matrix_debug_endpoints.description: Expose additional debug endpoints for troubleshooting.

log_level.name: Log level
log_level.description: The verbosity of the gateway log output.
